resources.string: Pedro is a tool of deprivation for your own good. If it helps you, buy me a coffee.

string-array.name: poe_messages
string-array.item: YOUR TIME IS PRECIOUS. USE IT TO BUILD YOUR DREAMS, NOT TO SCROLL THROUGH OTHERS\'.
DISCONNECT FOR A WHILE. THE REAL WORLD HAS MUCH BETTER GRAPHICS.
YOU CHOOSE WHAT TO DO WITH YOUR TIME, DON\'T LET AN ALGORITHM DECIDE.
BREATHE. YOU\'RE NOT MISSING ANYTHING IMPORTANT ON SOCIAL MEDIA. EVERYTHING THAT MATTERS IS HERE AND NOW.
EVERY MINUTE NOT SPENT HERE IS AN OPPORTUNITY TO LEARN, CREATE, OR SIMPLY REST.

resources.string: Pedro needs access to usage data to show you how much time you spend on social media.
You are about to open social media. Are you here for a purpose or to escape boredom? \nChoose now to return to living or waste your time by challenging the block.

Pedro is meant to help you fight digital addiction. Installing it just to have an app on your phone will do nothing without your real commitment. \n\nBe honest with yourself. If you\'re not serious, uninstall it now.
Number of times you gave in and opened a social app today.
Number of times you chose not to open the app after the Reality Check.
Total time spent TODAY on the apps you chose to block.
Total time lost on social media (only blocked apps) since you installed Pedro.
Enable Pedro\'s Accessibility Service to allow blocking of monitored apps.
Pedro needs overlay permission to show the quiz over other apps.
Have ideas to improve Pedro or want to say thanks? Hit me up on Instagram!
